title: Anti-Inflammatory Breakfast Bowl Walkthrough
description: Step-by-step photo carousel showing how to build a hormone-friendly breakfast bowl in under five minutes.
hook: Five ingredients. Five minutes. Five days of better mornings.

cta.text: Save this for tomorrow's grocery run

keyMessage: A balanced breakfast can be fast and ingredient-light.

strategy.keyMessage: A balanced breakfast can be fast and ingredient-light.
strategy.ctaText: Save this for tomorrow's grocery run

creativePlan.hook: Five ingredients. Five minutes. Five days of better mornings.

carousel.hook: Five ingredients. Five minutes. Five days of better mornings.

slides.headline: The 5-ingredient anti-inflammatory base
slides.body: Greek yogurt + berries + ground flax + walnuts + cinnamon. Stocks in two minutes; nothing exotic.
slides.altText: Overhead shot of a glass jar with yogurt, blueberries, ground flax, walnuts, and a cinnamon stick.

slides.headline: Why these five
slides.body: Each one targets a different inflammation lever: protein, polyphenols, fiber, omega-3s, and blood-sugar.
slides.altText: Five labeled jars, one per ingredient, lined up on a wooden counter.

slides.headline: The 5-minute morning
slides.body: Layer everything in a jar the night before. In the morning, stir and eat. That's the whole protocol.
slides.altText: A hand stirring a layered jar of yogurt and toppings beside a coffee cup.

slides.headline: Variations for the rest of the week
slides.body: Mon: classic. Tue: peach + ginger. Wed: cocoa + raspberry. Thu: apple + tahini. Fri: tropical.
slides.altText: Five jars side by side, each with a different fruit topping.

slides.headline: Save this for grocery day
slides.body: Tap the bookmark icon — your future-Monday-morning self will thank you.
slides.altText: A close-up of a hand bookmarking the post in the Instagram interface.
